title: CrowdStrike Ranks #1 Globally for Managed Detection and Response Market Share in Gartner® Report
text: AUSTIN, Texas--(BUSINESS WIRE)--CrowdStrike (Nasdaq: CRWD), a leader in cloud-delivered protection of endpoints, cloud workloads, identity and data, today announced that in 2021 it ranked #1 for revenue in Managed Detection and Response (MDR) for Managed Security Services in Gartner's new report: Market Share: Managed Security Services, Worldwide, 20211.
